caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview for "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems focused and engaged, possibly discussing topics related to business or entrepreneurship, given the context of the podcast's name. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
